creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2011-02-14 03:01:30 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/tortoisehg1    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  TortoiseHg is a Windows shell extension and a series of
  applications for the Mercurial  distributed revision control
  system. It also includes a Gnome/Nautilus extension and
  a CLI wrapper application so the TortoiseHg tools can be
  used on non-Windows platforms.
  
  WWW:    http://tortoisehg.bitbucket.org/
  
  PR:             ports/154659
  Submitted by:   arrowdodger <6yearold at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4222    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +60 -0     ports/devel/tortoisehg1/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/devel/tortoisehg1/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/devel/tortoisehg1/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +253 -0    ports/devel/tortoisehg1/pkg-plist (new)
